description:
This intermediate-to-advanced quiz evaluates practical PostgreSQL skills, testing knowledge of built-in aggregates, type casting, constraints, and common database gotchas. Delivered in an enthusiastic and gamified tone, it encourages developers to explore both familiar and obscure features while reinforcing best practices.
Topics: PostgreSQL, SQL Aggregates, Type Casting, Database Constraints, SQL Gotchas
Audience: Intermediate to advanced database developers and SQL practitioners
